description: Style Note Add a pop of colour to your summer wear wardrobe with this top from myntra. Featuring a colourful, all over print this piece scores high on style as well as comfort. Accessorise it with beaded bracelets and strappy wedge heels for an effortless yet inspired look. Product Details Cream printed translucent top with purple, blue and green floral print, V neckline, tiered ruffles around the neckline, ruffle detail down the centre front, cap sleeves and elasticated and smocked hemline Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash cold Tumble dry Use cool iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
